CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_Plaintiff_Intelligence Flow when the matched plaintiff profile has Is_Tribal_Nation__c = true. Tribal Nation challengers achieve 87.5% win rate in NEPA litigation (PermitTEC Stage 10) — the highest of any plaintiff category. Triggers an additional +10 risk score bonus beyond the standard plaintiff bonus.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: A federally recognized Tribal Nation has submitted a comment on this process. Tribal plaintiffs have the highest win rate in federal NEPA litigation. Immediate legal review and consultation documentation audit required.
CustomField.label: Tribal Plaintiff Flag
